description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine load_chng_5, and is implemented by a call to load_chng_5. Use this API routine to modify the data of an existing load in the working case (see PSSE Program Operation Manual, Load Data). This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr = load_chng_4(ibus, id, intgar, realar)

intgar.description: AREA, area number (area of bus IBUS by default).
ZONE, zone number (zone of bus IBUS by default).
OWNER, owner number (owner of bus IBUS by default).
SCALE, load scaling flag (0 = fixed, non-conforming; 1 = scalable, conforming) (1 by default).
INTRPT, interruptible load flag (0 = non-interruptible; 1 = interruptible) (0 by default).

realar.description: PL, constant power active load (0.0 by default).
QL, constant power reactive load (0.0 by default).
IP, constant current active load (0.0 by default).
IQ, constant current reactive load (0.0 by default).
YP, constant admittance active load (0.0 by default).
YQ, constant admittance reactive load (0.0 by default).

error_codes.description: load identifier is more than two characters.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.

data error, warning and information messages; one or more of: - invalid load status. - invalid area, zone or owner number. - area table is full. - zone table is full. - owner table is full. - invalid load scaling flag. - invalid interruptible load flag.
